name: browser-enhancements
description: Richer browser helpers for opening background pages, extracting larger page text, and reading linked pages with safer candidate selection.
when_to_use: Use this skill when you need richer page text extraction than the default browser snapshot tools.
Use this skill when you need to open a page in a new tab without replacing the current page.
Use this skill when you want one-hop reading from search results or visible page links, but still want the option to inspect candidate refs before opening one.
